title: Business Development Executive
description:
Ready to dive into the exciting world of media and sales? As part of our Business Development & Partnerships Team, you’ll be the driving force behind our media brands—reaching out, connecting, and building relationships with awesome clients. You should have great sales skill and excel in lead generation, business development, and account management.


Think of yourself as a matchmaker between brands and opportunities! You'll help clients grow their businesses, build long-term partnerships, and even spot ways to improve our sales process. If you love meeting new people, thinking on your feet, and making things happen—this is the perfect role for you!


What You Will Be Doing:

  • Identify, hunt and build new clientele and business opportunities.
  • Present, promote and sell our services/media products to prospective and existing partners.
  • Consistently achieve sales targets and KPIs.
  • Manage and maintain client accounts and relationships.
  • Work closely with other departments to ensure a seamless and successful campaign experience.
  • Manage accounts by ensuring brands’ objectives and timelines are met, overseeing creative development and video production and ensuring smooth delivery of deliverables.
  • Brainstorm creative marketing proposals and campaign ideas for client campaigns and support the Team in developing content that meet client’s objectives.
  • Serve as a launch point and lead point of contact for partners on all commercial activities and collaborations like media invites, media drops, sponsorships etc.
  • Establish post-implementation measures and evaluation to monitor performances including preparation of campaign reports.

What We Are Looking For:

  • Min. 2 years of relationship and sales experience with track record of success
  • Knowledgeable about the media industry, updated on trends and experienced in digital advertising sales.
  • Strong attention to detail and meticulous- initiative and do not need to be micromanaged.
  • Exercises sound judgement in establishing priorities, managing timelines and meeting deadlines.
  • Resilient and thrives in a challenging environment.
  • Charismatic, cheerful & positive with excellent interpersonal, communication and presentation skills.
  • Self-motivator with a competitive streak, always trying to exceed personal past achievements.
  • Problem solver for team and clients.
  • True Hunter, Relationship Builder and Legendary Closer – a positive influence on the Team.

[Candidates without 2 years of experience can apply via our Internship Conversion Program]

postedCompany.description:
Confirm Good is a Singapore-based media publishing platform that brings the latest deals, news and happenings to locals in our little red dot.


We offer first-hand information on deals and promotions on a daily basis and we curate and pick out the best deals for our subscribers. We are the first Telegram channel in Singapore to have exclusive partnerships with well-loved brands such as Krispy Kreme, Llao Llao, LiHO, and Tiger Sugar to offer our subscribers giveaways, one-for-one deals, and many other promotions and discounts!


We are expanding to bring our tight-knit community even closer by adding a more personal touch to our offerings through Confirm Good with not only a wider variety of partnerships, but also with articles covering various topics to appeal to a wider demographic.


With well-researched insights and advice spanning a wide range of topics, we seek to deliver simple to understand and beneficial contents for our readers.


We are always on a lookout for talents and we can offer you a broad range of exciting careers of your choice.


To qualify for a full-time position with us, we would prefer it if you have at least 2 years of working experience in a relevant field or if you can impress us with your work. 


If you are really keen to try your hand at something new and don’t have the experience, you can apply for our 6-month Internship Program.


We look forward to hearing from you :)


Don’t worry, Confirm Good Lah!
postedCompany.name: CONFIRM GOOD PTE. LTD.
